source.title: Glutamate transporter gene SLC1A1 associated with obsessive-compulsive disorder

description: SLC1A1 rs301434 is associated with obsessive-compulsive disorder susceptibility, particularly in males and those with hoarding symptoms. The gene encodes the neuronal glutamate transporter EAAT3.

AA.recommendation: Standard mental health monitoring; baseline assessment only

AG.effect: Heterozygous carrier; modest increased OCD risk, particularly in males
AG.recommendation: Psychiatric screening; monitor for obsessive or compulsive symptoms; early intervention if symptoms develop; family history assessment

GA.effect: Heterozygous carrier; modest increased OCD risk, particularly in males
GA.recommendation: Psychiatric screening; monitor for obsessive or compulsive symptoms; early intervention if symptoms develop; family history assessment

GG.effect: Homozygous for risk allele; substantially increased glutamatergic dysfunction risk
GG.recommendation: Comprehensive psychiatric evaluation; OCD screening with Yale-Brown Obsessive Compulsive Scale; early cognitive-behavioral therapy if symptoms present; medication options (SSRIs); augmentation with glutamatergic agents may be considered
